page_subtitle: Four squads, one club — representing Hong Kong Masters Hockey on the world stage.
join_text: Are you 35 or above and passionate about field hockey? We welcome players of all abilities. Trials are held at the start of each season — get in touch to find out more.

squads.name: Men's Over-35
squads.description: Our Men's Over-35 squad is the largest and most competitive squad in the club. Drawing from a deep pool of experienced local and expat players, the M35 team competes in regional Asia-Pacific tournaments and the World Masters Cup.

squads.name: Men's Over-45
squads.description: The Men's Over-45 squad combines deep experience with enduring passion for the game. This squad has achieved our club's best international results, including a bronze medal at the 2018 World Masters Cup in Barcelona.

squads.name: Men's Over-55
squads.description: Our newest competitive squad, the Men's Over-55 team was formed in 2023 and competes in selected regional and international tournaments. If you're 55 or above and want to lace up again, this squad is for you.

squads.name: Women's Team
squads.description: Open to women aged 35 and above, our Women's team has grown significantly since its formation in 2012. The squad competes in the Over-35 category internationally and is looking to expand its tournament schedule in 2026 and beyond.
